sourceMovie.title: Lionheart
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Lionheart works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Gladiator
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Lionheart clicked for you, Gladiator (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Lionheart?
faq.answer: Try Gladiator, Kill Bill: Vol. 1, Léon: The Professional—each shares DNA with Lionheart while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Lionheart?
faq.answer: Lionheart (1990) is best described as Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Lionheart worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
